ideas.title: Real-time crowd heatmap overlay
ideas.description: Interactive park map with color-coded crowd density by land/area, updating in real-time from live wait data.

ideas.title: "Best Time to Visit" content series
ideas.description: Weekly blog/video series analyzing optimal visit windows by park, using our forecast data as the backbone.

ideas.title: Stripe subscription tiers post-alpha
ideas.description: Free tier with basic forecasts, Pro tier ($5/mo) with entity-level predictions, alerts, and API access.

ideas.title: Discord bot /plan command
ideas.description: Users input date + park, bot returns an optimized ride order based on predicted waits throughout the day.

ideas.title: Automated Reddit posting for launches
ideas.description: Bot-assisted posting to r/WaltDisneyWorld, r/DisneyPlanning, r/UniversalOrlando with crowd forecasts.

ideas.title: ML model ensemble (XGBoost + LSTM)
ideas.description: Combine current XGBoost predictions with an LSTM time-series model for improved accuracy on high-variance days.

ideas.title: Park comparison dashboard
ideas.description: Side-by-side view comparing crowd levels across all 6 parks for a given date — helps users pick the least crowded park.

ideas.title: Affiliate links for Disney merch/tickets
ideas.description: Add Disney ticket affiliate links to forecast pages for passive revenue.

ideas.title: Wait time alerts via push notification
ideas.description: Users subscribe to alerts when their favorite ride drops below a threshold — requires mobile PWA or native app.

ideas.title: TikTok "Did You Know" shorts series
ideas.description: 15-second facts about theme park wait patterns — "Did you know Space Mountain is shortest at 2pm on Tuesdays?"

ideas.title: Backfill historical accuracy scoring
ideas.description: Run accuracy evaluation on all historical forecast data to build a comprehensive accuracy timeline from day 1.

ideas.title: Sponsor partnerships with travel blogs
ideas.description: Partner with Disney travel bloggers for cross-promotion — they embed our widgets, we feature their content.
